summary: Added pauseTrading(), unpauseTrading(), bool paused storage, TradingIsPaused error, TradingPaused/TradingUnpaused events, and whenNotPaused modifier to LPVault.sol. Applied whenNotPaused to mintPositionFor, notifyFees, updateTick, and mergePositions. LP exit paths (collect, reclaimDeposit) and emergencyCancelAll are unaffected. 15 integration tests covering pause+gate, unpause, access control, collect-while-paused, reclaim-while-paused, and phase independence.
